summary: Complete testing of Golf Trip Planner bug fixes. All 5 reported bugs verified as FIXED. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All Trip Planner flows working correctly including transfer-only, hotel-only, multi-service, date range selection, and deselection clearing itinerary.

bug_fix_verification.bug_1_next_button_transfer_only: PASS - Next button is now ENABLED when only 'Premium Transfer' is selected with a budget
bug_fix_verification.bug_2_stale_itinerary_entries: PASS - Deselecting services correctly removes them from itinerary. Tested: Hotel+Transfer → deselect Hotel → only Transfer shows
bug_fix_verification.bug_3_date_range_calendar: PASS - Calendar accepts arrival and departure dates (two clicks). Range highlights between them. Shows 'Arrival: X — Departure: Y'
bug_fix_verification.bug_4_mercedes_image: PASS - Mercedes S-Class image displays correctly in itinerary for Premium Transfer service
bug_fix_verification.bug_5_calendar_greyscale: PASS - Calendar uses stone-700 (dark grey) for selected endpoints, stone-200 (light grey) for range middle. No salmon/terracotta colors

backend_api_tests.transfer_with_budget: PASS - Transfer service works with all budget options (moderate, premium, luxury)
backend_api_tests.departure_date_field: PASS - departure_date field is accepted and persisted
backend_api_tests.departure_date_optional: PASS - departure_date is optional (single date still works)
backend_api_tests.all_service_combinations: PASS - All 4 services work individually and in any combination
backend_api_tests.all_four_services: PASS - Hotel + Restaurant + Beach Club + Transfer combination works

frontend_flow_tests.transfer_only_flow: PASS - Select Transfer → budget → Next → date range → See Suggestions → itinerary shows Mercedes S-Class → contact → submit
frontend_flow_tests.hotel_only_flow: PASS - Select Hotel → budget → Next → date range → See Suggestions → itinerary shows only hotel
frontend_flow_tests.multi_service_flow: PASS - Select all 4 services → itinerary shows all 4 items with images
frontend_flow_tests.deselection_flow: PASS - Select Hotel+Transfer → proceed → go back → deselect Hotel → proceed → itinerary shows only Transfer
frontend_flow_tests.step_count: PASS - Always shows 'Step X of 4' regardless of services selected
frontend_flow_tests.contact_summary: PASS - Summary shows only currently selected services and their itinerary items

passed_tests: BUG FIX #1: Next button enabled with transfer-only selection
BUG FIX #2: Stale itinerary entries cleared when deselecting services
BUG FIX #3: Calendar accepts date range (arrival + departure)
BUG FIX #4: Mercedes S-Class image displays in transfer itinerary
BUG FIX #5: Calendar uses greyscale colors (stone-700/stone-200)
POST /api/trip-planner - Transfer-only request succeeds
POST /api/trip-planner - Transfer with budget succeeds
POST /api/trip-planner - Transfer with other services succeeds
POST /api/trip-planner - Arrival and departure dates accepted
POST /api/trip-planner - departure_date persisted and retrievable
POST /api/trip-planner - departure_date optional (single date works)
POST /api/trip-planner - Hotel-only service works
POST /api/trip-planner - Restaurant-only service works
POST /api/trip-planner - Beach club-only service works
POST /api/trip-planner - Transfer-only service works
POST /api/trip-planner - All four services combined works
POST /api/trip-planner - Hotel + Transfer combination works
POST /api/trip-planner - Restaurant + Beach club combination works
POST /api/trip-planner - Moderate budget works
POST /api/trip-planner - Premium budget works
POST /api/trip-planner - Luxury budget works
Frontend - Transfer-only flow completes successfully
Frontend - Hotel-only flow shows only hotel in itinerary
Frontend - Multi-service flow shows all 4 items
Frontend - Deselection correctly updates itinerary
Frontend - Step indicator always shows 'Step X of 4'
Frontend - Contact summary matches selected services
Frontend - Form submission succeeds with success view

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 5 bug fixes verified, all flows working

seed_data_creation: Created test trip requests via API with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 Trip Planner bugs verified as fixed: (1) Next button works with transfer-only, (2) Deselecting services clears itinerary, (3) Calendar accepts date range, (4) Mercedes S-Class image shows for transfer, (5) Calendar uses greyscale colors. The wizard is always 4 steps. Key data-testids: service-hotel, service-restaurant, service-beach_club, service-transfer, budget-moderate/premium/luxury, trip-next-btn, trip-back-btn, trip-submit-btn, trip-planner-modal, trip-planner-step-1/2/3, trip-planner-step-contact, trip-planner-success. Backend accepts departure_date field for date ranges.
